parents.subject: LU-18569 tests: skip ls for ubuntu clients on sanity-sec/75a

commit.subject: LU-17000 lnet: Fix Data race when accessing ni_state
commit.message:
LU-17000 lnet: Fix Data race when accessing ni_state

Fix Data race when accessing ni_state. ni_state in
other places in the code is accessed within ni_lock.

CoverityID: 411660 ("Data race condition")
Fixes: 2be10428ac2 ("LU-11514 lnet: separate ni state from recovery")
Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet
Signed-off-by: Arshad Hussain <arshad.hussain@aeoncomputing.com>
Change-Id: I32f49ba84de9a65fc953ef1fc756caf50d27daf4
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61795
Reviewed-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Chris Horn <chris.horn@hpe.com>
